sys_script_client.description:
2.7.1 | 2021-12-16 | raj | DFCT0010561 - Empty "Subtask Name Modifier" causes weird task names on subtasks
2.5 P3 STRY0084306 - TUP - STRETCH - Template form - "Template Subtask Name Setting" - None, Suffix and Prefix STRY0084419 - TUP - STRETCH - Template Instance - Template Subtask(s) Name Setting" field on Template form set to "None" STRY0084420 - TUP - STRETCH - Template Instance - Template Subtask(s) Name Setting" field on Template form set to "Suffix" STRY0084424 - TUP - STRETCH - Template Instance - Template Subtask(s) Name Setting" field on Template form set to "Prefix"
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - The value entered will apply as a Prefix to the Task Name of all Subtasks Tasker - The value entered will apply as a Suffix to the Task Name of all Subtasks Tasker - Enter a value to apply a Prefix to the Task Name of all Subtasks Tasker - Enter a value to apply a Suffix to the Task Name of all Subtasks
sys_script_client.name: Temp Inst onChg/onLd Subtask Modifier
